---
title: "ryd-gate"
---

Rydberg neutral-atom many-body simulator: TFIM quenches, lattice dynamics,
and microscopic gate physics, with continuous-time pulse protocols as the
single control surface over one exact + tensor-network kernel.

## Where to start

| Goal | Page |
|---|---|
| Install and run a first simulation | [Getting Started](getting_started.qmd) |
| Units, conventions, data flow | [Fundamentals](fundamentals.qmd) |
| The exact Hamiltonian of every model | [Hamiltonians](hamiltonians.qmd) |
| Declarative noise on the exact Monte Carlo runner | [NoiseModel](how_to_noise.qmd) |
| CZ gate reports and error budgets | [Gate reports](how_to_gates.qmd) |
| What runs on which backend | [Capability Matrix](capability_matrix.qmd) |
| Complete public API | [API Reference](reference/index.qmd) |

## Build this site

```bash
uv sync --extra docs          # installs quartodoc
cd docs
uv run quartodoc build        # generate reference/ from docstrings
quarto render                 # writes docs/_build/html
```
